mapper.sql: id, track_id, job_id, enterprise_id, student_user_id, resume_id, deliver_time, deliver_status, hr_remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM job_deliver ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_deliver (track_id, job_id, enterprise_id, student_user_id, resume_id, deliver_status) VALUES (#{trackId}, #{jobId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{studentUserId}, #{resumeId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE job_deliver SET deliver_status = #{deliverStatus}, hr_remark = #{hrRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_user_id) FROM job_deliver WHERE deliver_status IN (4, 5)

SELECT CASE WHEN rj.salary_max <= 5000 THEN '5k以下' WHEN rj.salary_max <= 8000 THEN '5k-8k' WHEN rj.salary_max <= 12000 THEN '8k-12k' WHEN rj.salary_max <= 15000 THEN '12k-15k' ELSE '15k以上' END AS name, COUNT(jd.id) AS value FROM recruit_job rj LEFT JOIN job_deliver jd ON jd.job_id = rj.id WHERE rj.is_deleted = 0 AND rj.salary_max IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name ORDER BY value DESC
